Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

How to convince others of ISKCON - outsiders

Social · asked by user [] · 2008-02-19 · 4 answers
any suggestions?
user [2] · 2008-02-19
best preaching is to to make open warm friendship and they will want to follow up and be part of our movement, no matter what the problems might be.
user [192] · 2008-02-20
...start off by telling them Lord Shri Krishna is the Supreme Personality of Godhead and get them to chant Hare Krishna,then Krishna will give them the intelligence to understand what is Iskcon.
user [144] · 2008-02-20
Yes, mishra is correct. Making a warm friendship first is most important. Theres nothing worse than going to the Temple and being ignored.Preaching is important but I know I would never had joined if someone had not befriended me at the very beginning.
user [72] · 2008-02-20
being a good example in everything you do
